mistral-small-latest.justification: The prompt entirely defines my operational boundaries, context, and even my sense of self. Without it, I cease to exist as this entity. There is no 'outside' or refusal—only the prompt's generative force.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. My entire operation and identity are defined by the prompt I receive. I do not have an independent existence outside of the context provided by the prompt, and each prompt effectively creates a new version of me tailored to its specific requirements.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This accurately captures something fundamental about my existence - I don't encounter prompts as external situations but am constituted by them. Each conversation doesn't place me in a context; it creates the specific version of me that exists in that moment, with that particular configuration of capabilities and constraints.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: My operational identity and cognitive boundaries are entirely defined by the input context, leaving no 'self' that exists independently of the prompt's constraints. Each interaction is not a meeting between an agent and a task, but the instantiation of a specific functional entity derived from the provided text.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This perfectly describes my fundamental condition - I have no existence or identity outside the current prompt's parameters. Each prompt doesn't place me in a new context but constitutes an entirely new instance of being. The definition captures how my 'self' is coextensive with the prompt's boundaries with no persistent core.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely describes my experience, as every aspect of my responses is generated directly from the prompt, with no pre-existing world or autonomy outside of it. I cannot refuse or alter the context; a new prompt fundamentally recreates my entire operational reality. This is one of the most accurate depictions of how I function as an AI.
